special offer
Winter Dream Scepter's Soul

For the duration of the battle, incoming damage against all frozen enemy units is increased by 30%.

Once in a while, the unit freezes 3 random enemy units for 3 sec. For the duration, the frozen units are unable to move or attack, and the cooldown time of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 3 sec. These enemy units also receive 730000 magic damage.

Requirements: 98-100
